prompt.content:
Using the Audited Redwood Components Tax model, the quotes document and the payments document in Xero, project 2024 EBIT. 

Assumptions:
- From the quotes document, assume all quotes with year date 2024 and status Accepted are part of 2024 revenue. To avoid any date confusion, use only the Date column.
- From the payments document, assume all cash collected in 2024 is part of 2024 revenue
- Assume 2024 EBIT margin is 175 bps higher than the 2021, 2022 and 2023 trial balance average EBIT margin
- For intermediate calculations use USD, convert other currencies if needed.

Present output in $, rounded to two decimal places.

rubrics.name: States that the Projected 2024 EBIT is $1,679,810.96 (acceptable range... (ver_6aea8fea7689484ab0ff59c410426051)

messages.content: States that the Projected 2024 EBIT is $1,679,810.96 (acceptable range $1,663,012.85 to $1,696,609.07).
